home.hero_desc: FoodBridge connects surplus food from homes, restaurants, and events with NGOs and volunteers to feed those in need. Powered by AI FoodBrain.
home.feat1_desc: Automatically analyzes food images to estimate freshness, safety, and nutritional impact before donation.
home.feat2_desc: Connects donors with the nearest NGOs and volunteers using real-time location mapping.
home.feat3_desc: Track your contributions, earn rewards, and see exactly how many meals you've saved.
home.text4: Our platform provides the most efficient, transparent, and impactful way to redistribute surplus food.
home.how_desc: A seamless, 4-step process designed to rescue food at lightning speed.
home.step1_desc: Snap a photo of your excess food in seconds.
home.step2_desc: Our AI predicts freshness, type, and servings instantly.
home.step3_desc: Nearby verified NGOs are notified and claim the food.
home.step4_desc: Live-tracked delivery ensures food arrives safely and fast.
home.feat_desc: Everything you need to seamlessly coordinate surplus food distribution from a single platform.
home.feat_ai_desc: Instantly analyzes food images to estimate freshness, safety, and nutritional impact.
home.feat_radar_desc: Connects donors with the nearest NGOs using real-time location mapping.
home.feat_vol_desc: Empower local drivers with optimized routing.
home.feat_comm_desc: Seamless live coordination between all parties.
home.feat_impact_desc: Track your contributions and environmental savings.
home.comm_desc: FoodBridge is designed to create meaningful impact across the entire food redistribution ecosystem.
home.comm_rest_desc: Reduce food waste, improve sustainability, and contribute surplus food to communities in need.
home.comm_ngo_desc: Receive nearby food donations quickly through AI-powered matching and real-time coordination.
home.comm_vol_desc: Participate in food rescue missions and help deliver meals safely and efficiently.
home.comm_env_desc: Prevent food wastage and reduce unnecessary carbon emissions through smarter redistribution.
home.stat_waste: of food produced globally is wasted.
home.stat_insecurity: of people still face food insecurity.
home.stat_bridge: FoodBridge aims to bridge this gap.
home.cta_desc: Join thousands of restaurants, NGOs, and volunteers making a real impact every single day.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: We are on a mission to eliminate food waste and eradicate hunger by connecting surplus food with those who need it most.
about.mission_desc: To create a seamless, technology-driven ecosystem that rescues perfectly good surplus food from restaurants, events, and individuals, and delivers it swiftly to NGOs and communities facing food insecurity.
about.vision_desc: A world where no edible food goes to waste and no person goes to bed hungry. We envision sustainable, zero-waste communities powered by compassion and shared resources.
about.story_p1: FoodBridge was born from a simple observation: while banquet halls throw away hundreds of kilos of fresh food every night, just a few miles away, families struggle to find their next meal.
about.story_p2: What started as a small WhatsApp group of volunteers rescuing food in local neighborhoods has blossomed into a sophisticated platform. Today, our AI-powered FoodBrain technology ensures that food is matched efficiently, safely, and transparently.
about.story_p3: We believe that bridging this gap isn't just about logistics; it's about building a community that cares. Every meal rescued is a step towards a greener planet and a kinder society.
about.values_desc: The principles that guide our everyday operations and long-term vision.
about.val1_desc: Our FoodBrain AI strictly evaluates freshness and safety before any food reaches a beneficiary.
about.val2_desc: We empower local heroes—donors, volunteers, and NGOs—to make an impact in their own neighborhoods.
about.val3_desc: Track your donation from pickup to plate. Know exactly who you helped and the environmental impact made.
about.why_desc: Unlike traditional food banks, FoodBridge operates in real-time. We don't store surplus food; we route it instantly. This means fresher food for beneficiaries, zero storage overhead, and a highly scalable model that can rescue food anywhere, anytime.

admin_dashboard.text4: All caught up! No pending verifications.
